{{CargoOrgan
|name=Quantum Silicon Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10880
|idx=87
|description=Extracted from silicon-based lifeforms, these neural shards combine layered silicon and organic cores. Their reaction speed defies comprehension—carbon-based minds simply can’t keep up.
|skill=
|hp=1660
|def=229
|atk=216
|rush=233
|gene1=Per 10 Gene Seg. devoured, {race} RUSH +5
Specimen devoured: 400/400
|gene2=Dodge +6%
|gene3=Each round, {race} ATK +60
|gene4=Per 10 Sim Core LVL, {race} DEF +5
Sim Core: 500/500
|gene5=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
